transcript.text:
(8-9 hours of waiting...?) You have to wait 8-9 hours to eat this...
(What are we waiting for...?)
(Grilled short ribs)
(Just a simple...)
(12 servings?!)
(I'll show you the reason for the wait)
(Grilled short ribs full of straw fire scent that you would wait half a day for)
(Those who waited for this moment, eat as much as you want)
(As expected, restaurants you have to wait for are different) A restaurant I have to wait 8 hours for is different
(We'll reveal why there is a 8-9 hour wait time) It tastes like, 'I know why so many people come here'
Hello everyone
I'm here in Yongsan today
I came to...
Drum roll
I came to 'Mongtan'
People who like meat

all know about this restaurant, 'Mongtan'
This is the most famous place in Korea for grilled short ribs
(Legendary weekend waiting time) You have to wait 8-9 hours to eat here
It's known to be very difficult to eat here
On weekdays,
you might be able to get in right away
if you're really lucky
So I'm here on a weekday
I'm curious about how it'll taste
if I have to wait for 8-9 hours
('Mongtan' has a nice exterior design) This place looks really cool
('Mongtan' has a nice exterior design) Ta-da! It's almost one whole building
(There seems to be a waiting time today!) Grilled short ribs are popular these days
I'll head in
(Nice interior welcomes Tzuyang)
Look at this, they're grilling the meat

(Initial grilling the short ribs on straw fire) Are they doing the initial grilling?
Wow, I'm so excited
The menu is more simple than I thought
(Two main dishes) They have only grilled short ribs and straw-grilled pork belly
I came to eat grilled short ribs today
Their grilled short ribs is their signature dish
Let's go!
(Press) Ding-dong
- (Did you call?) - Hello
One order of grilled short ribs is 2 servings
One order is 2 servings?
Wait, then....
Should I get 6 orders?
- (Huh?) - 6 orders...
6 orders...?
Yes...

- Then, it's 12 servings, right? - Yes, 12 servings
And can I get the doenjang-jjigae too?
(That's it) And can I get one.. 2 Cokes?
- 2 Cokes? - Yes
(Initial firing is complete)
Doenjang-jjigae is here
- Do you want it on this side? - Yes, please put it here
(Delicious doenjang-jjigae with shepherd's purse) There's shepherd's purse on top so it'll be good
- to mix it before eating - Thank you
What are these side dishes?
They're very unique
What's this? Is this seokbakji?
(Short ribs are here) The 12 servings of short ribs are here
(Amazing) Thank you, could you put them in the front?
Will you be grilling them?
- Yes, I'll grill them for you! - Oh really?

What's this?
It's slightly frozen shredded radish
- Shredded radish? - Yes
(Grilled short ribs full of straw scent)
(Ah... It's melting...)
(Grilling complete)
- Do you want me to grill them all right away? - Yes hehe
I'll try this
I'm so excited
(How is it?)
It's delicious!
Wow, what kind of scent is that?
This is..
It's not the typical smoky flavor
It's straw fire! Right!
It's familiar but (unique flavor)

It's smells familiar but it's new
It's different from charcoal fire
It's so delicious
I...
I can feel the texture in my mouth
With a bit of wasabi this time
(Munch)
Wow, the straw fire flavor is really nice
I can feel the texture of the short ribs
It's seasoned
but it's not strong at all
(It goes well with everything) It's seasoned so that it's good to eat by itself or dipped in something
(It goes well with everything) The seasoning is really good
The scent is so nice more than anything
(The second short ribs are done!)
- Please call me if you need me! - Yes hehe

(Being dramatic)
Wow, I...
(Glance)
I couldn't be over the top since he was there
Wow, it's really delicious! Restaurants you have to wait 8 hours for are different!
Oh... It's...
The texture is no joke... and
I haven't really tried straw fire
So it's..
good
With salted oyster...
The green onions are sweet
So sweet!
I'll take off the garlic before they burn
I'll try it with the shredded radish this time
There's thin ice on it

(It's like eating cold noodles with short ribs?) It feels like eating cold noodles with thin ice
This is their signature side dish
Onion kimchi!
Is what they said
On top
It looks just like regular kimchi
Delicious
If it makes me eat something
(I'm eating onions... It's a real restaurant) I usually don't, it's a real restaurant
Gat-kimchi!
(Gat-kimchi is the best!) Wow! It's so good!
(Forgot about the doenjang-jjigae..) It looked so delicious but after eating that, I totally forgot about it
(Doenjang-jjigae full of shepherd's purse and meat) Mix in the shepherd's purse
(Doenjang-jjigae full of shepherd's purse and meat) Wow, the meat...
The doenjang-jjigae is a must
This is a doenjang-jjigae restaurant!

(Can't beat grilled short ribs) The meat is too good for it to be a doenjang-jjigae place
Everything here, from the side dishes
to the doenjang-jjigae, is perfect
Everything is so delicious
But I think
the best is this gat-kimchi
If the waiting time is that long,
your expectations go up
(Expectations rising)
There are many times when I think, 'It's not as good as I thought'
But this place meets those expectations
(There's a reason behind the long waiting time) It tastes like, 'I know why there's so many people here'
(Come here, short ribs!)
(Press)
(Already?)
After you left, she made a lot of fuss saying that it's delicious haha

(Shy)
There are a lot of customers here, right?
Right now,
it decreased!
When there were a lot of people,
we stopped accepting people around 3-4 even during weekdays
These days, you can get in
within an hour during the weekdays
- Oh really? - Yes
How long do people wait during the weekends?
They come at 11 and get inside at 5-6
(Even though it decreased, it's still long...) Even though the waiting time decreased, it's still hard to eat here
(Leaving for a moment) I'll grill it for you later
(Leaving for a moment) Yes! Thank you
(Back to dramatic Tzuyang) Wow.... This is really delicious!
(This is heaven) When you eat it hot as soon as it's grilled,

(This is heaven) it totally feels like I'm in heaven
(This is heaven) It's heaven!
(Dramatic Tzuyang ON)
(Dramatic Tzuyang OFF)
(Already on the 4th ordered of short ribs)
This is not the speed of one person eating
It's like 3-4 people eating
It feels like I'm eating cold noodles
If you order bibim-naengmyeon, the shredded radish is there as garnish
(Time to start fighting over what day to come..) I think the key is to choose the right day
The doenjang-jjigae
is so delicious!
I'm good at making doenjang-jjigae
(Better than me...) This is a little bit better
No more?
(Press)

- Do you want the rest grilled? - Yes haha
(It doesn't look like too much..) Wouldn't 2 orders be enough for one person?
When people only eat the meat, they think,
'I probably can eat 2 orders...'
But after deboning it...
A lot of people say, 'I can't eat it all...'
(Still a lot) There's still this much meat
(Still a lot) There's a lot of meat on the bone
This one has a strong straw fire scent
The straw fire scent is crazy
This one is so big
(Can't take her eyes off of it even when eating)
(The last grilled short ribs are complete!)
I mean,
there aren't a lot of places who sell meat grilled with straw fire
I haven't tried a lot

It's very unique
So juicy
(Juice explosion)
Ah!
(It was so delicious that she bit her tongue..) I bit my tongue!
(Yeah, you weren't even breathing...) Ugh.. I always bite my tongue when I eat fast
(But I can't stop...)
(The reason why the scent was stronger towards the end) There's straw fire under here
There aren't a lot of meat left
I'm excited for the meat on the bones
What will it taste like?
There aren't a lot of meat left
(There's still meat on the bones!) but since there's meat on the bones, I'm not worried
(Press)
(Cutting time)
Wow, there's more meat than I thought...

(A lot of meat..!) The bone is not that big at all
(Almost 1 serving) This is just like 1 serving
(The meat on the bone is like 2 servings!) Whoa, this is all meat?
(The meat on the bone is like 2 servings!) Yes, this is a small piece of meat behind the thin bone
(Full)
(Excellent, chewy fascia)
We call this part fascia
It's chewy in texture
The fat will taste very savory
You won't taste the seasoning as much
The texture is way different!
It's so chewy!
(It's like a refill) Wow, look how much there is!
If it's too much, I can get it packed for you...
You don't have to worry about that haha
(Worries left) Thank you

Wow, this is so...
(Glance)
It's so chewy
and it may seem tough
but it's not
It's fun to chew like when you eat cartilage
You know the fascia
on LA galbi
It's like that with a lot of meat
Oh this is delicious
It's definitely not greasy
(Self-reflection time..) I was like, 'There's not gonna be that much meat on the bones'
(Doenjang-jjigae was heated up) Thank you
(Doenjang-jjigae was heated up) Enjoy
Doenjang-jjigae is good when it's hot
(Eating the fascia in an instant)

(Last piece with kimchi) Oh no... I ate it all
Unbelievable!
(You're more unbelievable...)
(Complete) Clear!
The bones..!
(So many bones)
(Scary pile of bones) Whoa... These are the bones
Wow, I ate so well today
I had a great meal today as well
